SmtpSettings._comment: Gmail SMTP configuration. Port 587 for TLS. Password should be Gmail App Password (16 characters). Set via environment variable SMTP__PASSWORD for security.

ConnectionStrings.DefaultConnection: Host=aws-1-ap-northeast-2.pooler.supabase.com;Port=5432;Database=postgres;Username=postgres.dhbgcoscqujsfycytvns;Password=SET_VIA_ENV;SSL Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=true;Pooling=true;Minimum Pool Size=1;Maximum Pool Size=5;Connection Idle Lifetime=300;Timeout=60;Command Timeout=60;Keepalive=30;Tcp Keepalive=true
ConnectionStrings._comment: WARNING: This file may be committed to version control. For production, use environment variables or .NET User Secrets. See docs/DATABASE_SETUP.md for secure credential management. Using direct Supabase connection (Port=5432) with optimized pooling settings.

JwtSettings._comment: RS256 asymmetric signing using RSA key pair (TR-012). Session timeout 15 minutes (NFR-005). Keys loaded from src/backend/rsa-keys directory. IMPORTANT: Never commit private key to version control - use environment variables or Azure Key Vault in production.

CorsSettings._comment: Production frontend URL: propeliq.infinityfree.me. Development origins in appsettings.Development.json

RedisSettings._comment: Upstash Redis connection string format: redis://default:password@host:port. Set Enabled=false to disable Redis and use database-only fallback. AbortOnConnectFail=false enables graceful degradation per AG-001. Store connection string in environment variables for production (e.g., REDIS__CONNECTIONSTRING).

AppointmentSettings._comment: Minimum hours advance notice required for appointment cancellation (US_027 - FR-011). Configurable per deployment environment.

WaitlistSettings._comment: Waitlist slot availability notification settings (US_041 - FR-010). ResponseTimeoutMinutes: Time patient has to respond to slot offer (default 30 min). DetectionIntervalCron: Slot detection job interval (every 2 minutes). TimeoutCheckIntervalCron: Timeout processing job interval (every 1 minute). Cron format: minute hour day month day-of-week.

RiskScoringWeights._comment: Configurable weights for no-show risk scoring (US_038 - TR-020, FR-023). Weights must sum to 1.0. Can be overridden via SystemSettings table (Risk.LeadTimeWeight, Risk.HistoryWeight, Risk.ConfirmationWeight keys).

Pusher._comment: Pusher Channels configuration for real-time queue updates (US_030 - FR-013). Set Enabled=true and configure credentials from Pusher dashboard (https://dashboard.pusher.com). Free tier: 200K messages/day, 100 concurrent connections. Store credentials in environment variables for production (e.g., PUSHER__KEY, PUSHER__SECRET).

TwilioSettings._comment: Twilio SMS gateway for appointment reminders (US_037 - TR-010). Set Enabled=true and configure credentials from Twilio Console (https://console.twilio.com). Free tier: Trial credits with verified phone numbers. FromPhoneNumber must be a Twilio-provisioned number. Store credentials in environment variables for production (e.g., TWILIOSETTINGS__ACCOUNTSID, TWILIOSETTINGS__AUTHTOKEN).

FileStorage._comment: File storage paths for clinical document uploads (US_042). Temp path stores chunks during upload, permanent path stores finalized documents. Ensure these directories have proper permissions and are NOT in version control (add to .gitignore). In production, use Azure Blob Storage or AWS S3.

Hangfire._comment: Hangfire health check thresholds (US_043). MaxQueueDepth: Alert if enqueued jobs exceed this count. MaxFailedJobs: Alert if failed jobs exceed this count.

DocumentProcessing._comment: Document processing health check thresholds (US_043). MaxBacklogMinutes: Alert if documents remain in Uploaded status longer than this. MaxFailedJobs: Alert if failed documents exceed this count.

GeminiAI._comment: Google Gemini API configuration (US_045 - task_002). ApiKey from Google AI Studio (https://aistudio.google.com/apikey). Free tier: 15 RPM, 1M TPM, 1500 RPD. ModelName: gemini-1.5-flash-latest (fast, cost-effective) or gemini-1.5-pro-latest (more capable). MaxTokens per page to stay within limits. Store API key in environment variables (GEMINIAI__APIKEY).

Supabase._comment: Supabase Storage REST API configuration (US_042/US_045). ApiKey must be the service_role (secret) key to bypass RLS. StorageBucket 'propelIq' for document storage. Store the secret key in .env as SUPABASE__APIKEY. The S3 endpoint and S3 access keys are no longer needed — we use the Supabase REST Storage API.

Tesseract._comment: Tesseract OCR configuration (US_045 - task_002). DataPath contains trained data files (eng.traineddata). Download from https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tessdata.
